## Fixed
- **In-game config screen on both loaders.** Cloth Config has no Minecraft 26.2 build, so opening the config screen errored — from ModMenu on Fabric, and from the mods-list Config button on NeoForge. The screen has been rebuilt as a native Minecraft options screen (Double Jump / Dash / Afterimage / General sections), so it works again on 26.2.

## Changed
- **Dropped the Cloth Config dependency on both loaders.** Settings are still stored at `config/enhancedmovement.json` with the same field names, so your existing config carries over unchanged. Fabric opens the screen via ModMenu; NeoForge via the mods-list Config button.

## Notes
- No gameplay changes: double jump, dash, ledge grab, and afterimages behave exactly as in 2.2.1.
